purpose: Group of mutually exclusive button options shown side-by-side. Used for view-mode switching, mode toggling, or single-select from 2-5 options.
whenToUse: Time period selector (Day / Week / Month / Year)
Filter category toggle when options are mutually exclusive
Wizard step jump (rare; usually use IconTabBar)
whenNotToUse: More than 5 options — use Select or IconTabBar
doRules: Mark exactly one segment as selected at all times
Use Tabs for navigation, SegmentedButton for view-state
dontRules: Do not allow zero-selected state (always one is active)
Do not exceed 5 segments — readability degrades
Do not mix SegmentedButton with Select for the same axis
Do not use SegmentedButton on narrow mobile viewports (use Select)

layoutGuidance.placement: Place SegmentedButton inside a compatible container (OverflowToolbar, DynamicPageTitle, FilterBar).
layoutGuidance.sizing: Auto width unless explicitly sized; height matches density (Compact 26-32px, Cozy 36-44px).
layoutGuidance.spacing: 8px gap from adjacent elements; 16px between groups.

contentGuidance.labelLength: See doRules for specific length guidance.

responsiveBehavior.M: May condense or collapse — see Fiori responsive design guidelines.
responsiveBehavior.S: May convert to alternative pattern (Popover, Dialog) on narrow viewports.

accessibilityGuidance.ariaPattern: Maps to ARIA pattern appropriate for input — see SAP Fiori a11y docs.
accessibilityGuidance.keyboard: Full keyboard support — Tab to focus, Enter/Space to activate.

exceptions: See pluginNotes for plugin-specific rendering caveats.
